subject: long time! coffee next week?
body_text:
Hey, it's been ages -- I think the last time we caught up was right after you left the gig at Hooli? I'm finally back in town for a couple weeks before the next thing starts. Would love to grab coffee and hear what you've been up to. The 'intelligent.workflow.engine' address gave me a chuckle, btw.

Free any weekday morning -- you pick the cafe.

-- Sam
